001package net.okocraft.box.api.message.argument;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005
006/**
007 * An interface to create a component with three arguments.
008 *
009 * @param <A1> first argument type
010 * @param <A2> second argument type
011 * @param <A3> third argument type
012 */
013public interface TripleArgument<A1, A2, A3> {
014    /**
015     * Creates a {@link Component}.
016     *
017     * @param a1 first argument
018     * @param a2 second argument
019     * @param a3 third argument
020     * @return the {@link Component} that is applied arguments
021     */
022    @NotNull Component apply(@NotNull A1 a1, @NotNull A2 a2, @NotNull A3 a3);
023}
